plugin.name: Granola Sync
plugin.description: Syncs Granola AI meeting notes into NotePlan with configurable content sections, attendee tags, and daily note integration
plugin.author: Danny McClelland

plugin.commands.name: syncGranolaNotes
plugin.commands.description: Sync recent notes from Granola AI

plugin.commands.name: syncGranolaNotesAll
plugin.commands.description: Sync ALL historical notes from Granola AI (ignores sync limit)

plugin.settings.title: Granola Access Token
plugin.settings.description: Your Granola API access token. To find it: open ~/Library/Application Support/Granola/supabase.json, find workos_tokens (or cognito_tokens), and copy the access_token value.

plugin.settings.title: Sync Folder
plugin.settings.description: NotePlan folder where synced notes are created

plugin.settings.title: Date Format
plugin.settings.description: Date format for filenames. Use YYYY (year), MM (month), DD (day), HH (hour), mm (minute), ss (second)

plugin.settings.title: Document Sync Limit
plugin.settings.description: Maximum number of documents to sync per run (used by the standard sync command)

plugin.settings.title: Skip Existing Notes
plugin.settings.description: Skip notes that already exist in NotePlan (matched by Granola ID). When disabled, existing notes are updated if the Granola version is newer.

plugin.settings.title: Include My Notes
plugin.settings.description: Include your personal notes from Granola in a '## My Notes' section

plugin.settings.title: Include Enhanced Notes
plugin.settings.description: Include AI-generated enhanced notes from Granola in a '## Enhanced Notes' section

plugin.settings.title: Include Transcript
plugin.settings.description: Include the full meeting transcript (requires an extra API call per note, may slow down sync)

plugin.settings.title: Include Attendee Tags
plugin.settings.description: Add meeting attendees as #hashtags at the top of each note

plugin.settings.title: Exclude My Name
plugin.settings.description: Your name as it appears in Granola meetings (excluded from attendee tags). Leave empty to include everyone.

plugin.settings.title: Mirror Granola Folders
plugin.settings.description: Organise notes into subfolders matching your Granola folder structure (e.g. Granola/Work, Granola/Personal)

plugin.settings.title: Enable Daily Note Integration
plugin.settings.description: Add today's synced meetings to your daily note with times and wiki-links

plugin.settings.title: Daily Note Section Heading
plugin.settings.description: Section heading for meetings in daily notes
